name: Mexican Corn Bread (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the first six ingredients: yellow cornmeal, all-purpose flour, sugar, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients: eggs, buttermilk, vegetable oil, cream-style corn, chopped onion, green pepper, and shredded cheddar cheese until just combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients in the mixing bowl and stir only until moistened.
4. Transfer the batter to a greased 9-inch square baking pan or 10-inch heavy skillet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and tests done.
Yield: 8-10 servings.
